episode.title: MTG Fast Finance 359: Phyrexia All Will Be One Reveals
episode.description: James and Derek walk you through all the latest in Magic the Gathering finance including your weekly Meta update, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and look over all the fresh reveals for Phyrexia All Will Be One.
